arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Serge Gnabry ready to take over England (again)
arts.sum: Not only does Gnabry have experience playing in England during his time with Arsenal FC (Gnabry played for the Gunners and also went on loan to West Brom), but he has routinely smashed any English club standing in his way since joining Bayern Munich. The Bayern Munich star likes playing in England...

arts.ttl: “These players belong at the top”: Vincent Kompany raves over Bayern Munich’s attacking players ahead of Champions League tilt
arts.sum: “We’re very happy that many of the boys have performed well in the attacking area,” Kompany said ahead of Wednesday’s Aston Villa match. Just like Michael [Olise], like Kingsley [Coman], like Mathys [Tel] — I hope I’m not forgetting anyone.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Bayern Munich: Jose Mourinho record to be matched by Unai Emery?
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery can match a Champions League record held by Jose Mourinho if the Premier League outfit defeat Bayern Munich on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Villa v Bayern Munich Youth League on VillaTV+
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. FC Bayern München - Wed, Oct 2nd 2024, 13:00 Aston Villa take on Bayern Munich in the UEFA Youth League on Wednesday afternoon and you can watch all the action live on VillaTV+. The Young Lions face Bayern (ko 1pm) in matchday two of the prestigious youth club competition, just hours before the two clubs go head-to-head in the UEFA Champions League at Villa Park. Josep Gombau’s side started their Youth League campaign with a narrow 2-1 defeat against BSC Young Boys last month. Rory Wilson handed Villa the lead midway through the first half in Bern before the hosts struck back to turn around the encounter and clinch all three points. The Villans are now at home to Bayern in their next match of the competition, which mirrors the club’s Champions League 'league stage’ but is limited to the first six matchdays. And, with the encounter sold out, you can watch all the action live from Bodymoor Heath on VillaTV+. Aston Villa v Bayern Munich UEFA Youth League Watch on VillaTV+

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa welcome Bayern Munich to Villa Park on Wednesday night, as Birmingham celebrates the return of big-time European football. The club’s first home fixture in Europe’s top competition since 1983 is a fitting one, as six-time European champions Bayern Munich visit in a rematch of Aston Villa’s greatest night.
